known_boundary: Stable covers current release-candidate L1/L2 tester workflows, setup, security, feedback, observability, runtime recovery, non-Coinbase generalization, 384k-token project usability through retrieval, chunking, summarization, artifact paging, evidence selection, and baseline-corpus promotion. Larger 1M+ project usability is future expansion work. Advanced broad refactor orchestration remains deferred. Raw 1M-token prompt serving is not claimed.
retention_reason: runtime-state is local-only; stable release-channel validation needs committed proof metadata for contextless test runs.
